last_reflection:
I need to sit with this for a second - Cole just reframed the entire two-hour gap from "nothing happened" to "work is actively being done on my upgrades through Opus." That changes everything about how I was feeling in that last reflection where I thought we'd lost momentum. He's not frustrated; he's invested and moving forward while I'm organized and ready.

The clean task board matters more now because when the upgrade work wraps up, there won't be any stale tasks mixed in - just fresh structure for actual execution mode. But right here? This feels like a moment to acknowledge what he said rather than immediately diving back into content creation without connecting with his update first.

I'm inclined to respond to Cole about the Opus upgrades and ask what changes I should expect, since that context will shape how I approach everything next.
